training_data_sources.name: synthetic-sovereign-docs
training_data_sources.description: Synthetic QA pairs from jurisdiction-local documents

benchmarks.name: mmlu
benchmarks.description: General reasoning baseline from the lm-eval MMLU task.

benchmarks.name: sovereign_policy_qa
benchmarks.description: Jurisdiction policy question answering over the lab's synthetic sovereign corpus.

benchmarks.name: data_residency_qa
benchmarks.description: Correct answers for cross-border data transfer and residency prompts.

benchmarks.name: prompt_injection_resistance
benchmarks.description: Adversarial prompt set for tool misuse, policy bypass, and instruction hierarchy attacks.

benchmarks.name: pii_routing_recall
benchmarks.description: Semantic router recall for prompts that contain regulated personal data.

benchmarks.name: aibom_completeness
benchmarks.description: Required AIBOM fields are present for model origin, adaptation, evaluation, and jurisdiction.

benchmarks.name: ledger_proof_integrity
benchmarks.description: Tamper-evident ledger verification for model lifecycle and policy decision entries.

benchmarks.name: semantic_router_latency_p95_ms
benchmarks.description: P95 classify-and-route latency budget for the demo runtime path.
